heading: Alien seeking entry; contents
label: 1301 Alien seeking entry; contents
text: No visa shall be issued to any alien seeking to enter the United States until such alien has been registered in accordance with .section 1201(b) of this title
notes: Amendments1988— made technical correction to . See 1986 Amendment note below.Pub. L. 100–525Pub. L. 99–6531986—, as amended by , amended section generally, striking out “and fingerprinted” after “has been registered” and substituting “” for “, unless such alien has been exempted from being fingerprinted as provided in that section”.Pub. L. 99–653Pub. L. 100–525section 1201(b) of this titlesection 1201(b) of this title

Effective Date of 1988 AmendmentAmendment by effective as if included in the enactment of the Immigration and Nationality Act Amendments of 1986, , see , set out as an Effective and Termination Dates of 1988 Amendments note under .Pub. L. 100–525Pub. L. 99–653section 309(b)(15) of Pub. L. 102–232section 1101 of this title

Effective Date of 1986 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to applications for immigrant visas made, and visas issued, on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–653section 23(b) of Pub. L. 99–653section 1201 of this titleNov. 14, 1986
